# Creating Value with COMP110

<!-- I brainstormed ideas to help COMP110 meet the needs of its students. I suggested introducing some aspects of different coding languages to the rubric. -->
<img src="<custom-path>/static/imgs/logo.png" alt="Image of Comp110 rainbow logo. "  width="500"/>

## Why add other coding languages?

A handful of majors require their students to take COMP110 as their only coding class. COMP110 teaches students how to use Python, but other fields often use different languages. If this class introduced some basics about these languages it would benefit students coding in the future.
